message:
🌱 Add backstage: [RFC] Standardize AWS authentication in Backstage mission (#912)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,75 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "backstage-12844-rfc-standardize-aws-authentication-in-backstage",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "backstage: [RFC] Standardize AWS authentication in Backstage",
+    "description": "[RFC] Standardize AWS authentication in Backstage. Requested by 36+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current Backstage deployment and version",
+        "description": "Verify your Backstage version supports the unified AWS credentials provider. Check your `package.json` for the Backstage version:\n```bash\ncat package.json | grep '@backstage/core'\n```\nThis feature requires Backstage v1.10+ with the `@backstage/integration-aws-node` package."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Configure unified AWS authentication in app-config.yaml",
+        "description": "Add the standardized AWS integration configuration to your `app-config.yaml`. This provides a common credential provider for all AWS-dependent Backstage plugins:\n```yaml\nintegrations:\n  aws:\n    default:\n      # Optional: falls back to default credential provider chain\n      accessKeyId: ${AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID}\n      secretAccessKey: ${AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY}\n      assumeRole: arn:aws:iam::123456789012:role/backstage-main-role\n      externalId: 'some-id'\n    accounts:\n      # Optional: if no accounts are specified, falls back to default creds\n      - accountId: '111111111111'\n        assumeRole: arn:aws:iam::111111111111:role/backstage-role\n        externalId: 'hello'\n      - accountId: '222222222222'\n        assumeRole: arn:aws:iam::222222222222:role/backstage-role\n        externalId: 'world'\n```\nThis replaces per-plugin credential configuration with a unified approach."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Install the AWS integration package",
+        "description": "Install the unified AWS credential provider package:\n```bash\nyarn --cwd packages/backend add @backstage/integration-aws-node\n```\nBackend plugins that need AWS access (S3 discovery, TechDocs with S3 storage, etc.) will automatically use the credentials defined in the integration configuration."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify AWS authentication works",
+        "description": "Start Backstage and confirm that AWS-dependent features work correctly:\n```bash\nyarn dev\n```\nTest by accessing features that require AWS credentials (e.g., S3-based catalog locations, TechDocs stored in S3). Check the Backstage logs for any AWS authentication errors."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "A unified AWS credential provider library (@backstage/integration-aws-node) centralizes AWS authentication configuration in app-config.yaml, replacing per-plugin credential setup. Supports default credentials, per-account role assumption, and optional per-plugin overrides.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "integrations:\n  aws:\n    default:\n      accessKeyId: ${AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID}\n      secretAccessKey: ${AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY}\n      assumeRole: arn:aws:iam::123456789012:role/backstage-main-role\n      externalId: 'some-id'\n    accounts:\n      - accountId: '111111111111'\n        assumeRole: arn:aws:iam::111111111111:role/backstage-role\n        externalId: 'hello'\n      - accountId: '222222222222'\n        assumeRole: arn:aws:iam::222222222222:role/backstage-role\n        externalId: 'world'"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "backstage",
+      "incubating",
+      "app-definition",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "backstage"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "advanced",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "incubating",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/backstage/backstage/issues/12844",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/backstage/backstage",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/backstage/backstage/pull/14125"
+    },
+    "reactions": 36,
+    "comments": 19,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "tools": [
+      "yarn",
+      "node"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Backstage instance with backend plugins that require AWS access (e.g., S3 catalog locations, TechDocs)."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-13T06:21:11.569Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,

+  }
+}
